---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a change or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want to do

<!-- The user-facing outcome — not the implementation. Imagine you're
explaining the missing capability to a teammate over coffee. -->

## Why this matters

<!-- Who hits this? How often? What's the cost of NOT having it?
Concrete examples beat hypotheticals. -->

## What you've tried as a workaround

<!-- Optional. Even "I just live with it" is useful — it tells us how
painful the gap currently is. -->

## How you imagine it working

<!-- Optional. A sketch of the UI/CLI/API shape. Don't feel obliged to
design the whole feature — sometimes the implementer has a better idea
than the requester, but knowing your mental model is still useful. -->

## Out of scope (optional)

<!-- Anything you specifically DON'T want. Helps avoid feature creep. -->
